summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StreamVault livestream platform. All core features functional including authentication, streaming, chat, donations, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat input field not easily visible on stream page - may be scrolled out of view

integration_issues.issue: Search for 'gaming' returns 0 results despite gaming streams being present

design_issues.issue: Categories section shows 0 category elements on homepage but categories work in browse page

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and live streams
Browse page with streams and categories tabs
Stream page with video player and follow functionality
Donation modal opens and packages selectable
Dark theme with Electric Blue (#00E5FF) styling
